protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: virions delipidated with low concentrations of non-ionic detergent; lyse virions (0.2 mM Triton X-100); incubated at 37C; ultracentrifugation

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: Cells grown to near-confluence were washed and lysed using the Dounce homogeniser. The lysate was cleared by centrifugation ... followed by ultracentrifugation

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: Triton X-100 detergent was added at room temperature to virions ... then immediately diluted ... and centrifuged at 100,000 g for 2 h
